validation_velocity.validation_model: Landing page + pre-sale + 10 customer interviews + 1 paid cohort test
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 5 qualified leads reach checkout or paid deposit intent and at least 2 commit within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: Paid traffic and outreach fail to produce at least 2 qualified checkout or deposit signals in the test window.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 7; citation status ready; regulatory route present

demand_pull.derivation_basis: Screenshots confirm strong adjacent OET demand and exam-intent queries, but not a clear nursing-specific owned channel. Added latest SEMrush scorecard sync.

regulatory_context.derivation_basis: Derived from confirmed regulatory requirements, approval entities, and current contradiction/risk density in the evidence-backed card.

semrush_snapshot.serp_feature_notes: Use OET screenshots to mine exam-intent terms first. Nursing-specific long-tail still needs a cleaner dedicated pass.
semrush_snapshot.traffic_analytics_notes: The official OET domain currently appears to own the best traffic-bearing query family in db=US; this is keyword-structure evidence, not local pull proof.

collapsed_scores.confidence_reason: Market evidence scope is reference with scope fit fit. 3 anchor captures contribute to this scorecard sync. Primary evidence database: US. Segment-aware operator weight: 1.6/5.

market_evidence.derivation_basis: Synced from the latest SEMrush-derived product market scorecard, which combines normalized keyword captures, product-market mapping, and scoped local/cross-border/reference evidence rules.

independent_operator_examples.name: Official OET sample tests
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Free official route resources create real exam pressure and pricing pressure.

pricing_or_offer_proof: The current validated layer proves exam-route pressure more clearly than a fragmented prep-provider map.
independent_operator_summary.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.

segment_weighting.rationale: B2C product. Operator proof relevance: high. Social funnel relevance: high. Institution-led supply caps the weight of operator evidence.

independent_operator_summary.takeaway: The nursing OET route is real, but operator fragmentation is not yet captured cleanly in the validated card layer.
independent_operator_summary.why_not_stronger: A validated prep-provider set has not yet been written into the card.

market_evidence.next_research_step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks
market_evidence.notes: Current SEMrush evidence matches the expected scope for this product (reference). Evidence database: US. Captured 3/3 anchor families with total local query volume 850 and max anchor volume 590. Lane rollup contains 18 deduplicated keywords, including 3 P1 terms. Current watchlist domains: oet.com, youtube.com, apple.com, edubenchmark.com, oetpracticeonline.com. Top follow-up keywords: oet preparation for nurses (P2, vol 20), best book for oet preparation for nurses (P2, vol 10), free online oet preparation course for nurses (P2, vol 10), oet exam preparation for nurses (P2, vol 10), oet exam sample test (P1, vol 260). Operator evidence is weighted for B2C: score 1.6/5 with adjustment -0.25. Next step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks.
